visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A man with brown hair wearing a white polo shirt with red and blue horizontal stripes stands next to a gold-colored clothing rack. He is inspecting various colorful shirts, looking frustrated and gesturing toward the messy arrangement. The room has neutral beige walls and bright, even indoor lighting. (2) A woman in pink overalls joins him, holding a white handheld Morus V6 device. She smiles enthusiastically at the camera, holding the device up to demonstrate its size and sleek design. (3) Close-up shots show the white device's circular nozzle and its digital display screen. The woman begins using the device on a white dress shirt and a yellow patterned t-shirt hanging on the rack, moving it in smooth vertical motions. (4) The scene shifts to a grey fabric sofa. The woman uses the device on the sofa surface and then on a yellow flower-shaped plush pillow. High-contrast text overlays in red and blue highlight different features. (5) The man holds up a green shirt and looks skeptical, pointing at the fabric. The woman continues to demonstrate the device on the shirt, pointing at its features while maintaining an upbeat expression. (6) The woman opens a small compartment at the back of the device to reveal collected lint and dust. She uses a small white brush to clean the filter while the man looks on with a surprised and impressed facial expression.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 自己在燙衣服的. (2) [Variety]: 遍. (3) [Variety]: 真麻煩. (4) [Variety]: 亂做. (5) [Variety]: 勾到了. (6) [Variety]: 講不聽. (7) [Subtitle]: 要穿的時候再整理就好. (8) [Subtitle]: 還有灰塵. [Subtitle]: 再整理. (9) [Subtitle]: 燙衣服很花時間. (10) [Subtitle]: 有時候你還會燙到手呢. (11) [Subtitle]: 不用怕. (12) [Subtitle]: Morus V6 手持式電子衣櫥. (13) [Subtitle]: 20秒. (14) [Subtitle]: 不用三分鐘呢. (15) [Subtitle]: 就可以燙完衣服. (16) [Subtitle]: 同時幫衣服完成. (17) [Slogan]: 殺菌&護理. (18) [Subtitle]: 平常使用掛燙機呢. (19) [Subtitle]: 你要用手拉. (20) [Subtitle]: 然後撐衣服才可以燙平. (21) [Subtitle]: 甚至呢還會被燙到. (22) [Subtitle]: Morus它擁有. (23) [Subtitle]: 三段式超強吸力 (強/中/關). (24) [Subtitle]: 讓你免拉衣角 單手就能輕鬆操作. (25) [Subtitle]: 再也不怕手被燙到. (26) [Subtitle]: 連出氣都很強. (27) [Subtitle]: 不同材質都可以燙. (28) [Subtitle]: 連牛仔褲也可以哦. (29) [Subtitle]: 它不只可以燙衣服. (30) [Slogan]: 除塵去味. (31) [Subtitle]: 你是不是不喜歡去火鍋店吃火鍋. (32) [Subtitle]: 不喜歡那個味道很重. (33) [Subtitle]: 用這個燙一燙. (34) [Subtitle]: 把衣服上的灰塵 連同臭味一起消失. (35) [Subtitle]: 家裡啊像你有那種小朋友的. (36) [Slogan]: 高溫殺菌. (37) [Subtitle]: 你不只是衣服. (38) [Subtitle]: 枕頭 娃娃 抱枕. (39) [Subtitle]: 都可以燙還可以殺菌喔. (40) [Subtitle]: 有效去除細菌 塵蟎. (41) [Subtitle]: 不怕把細菌病毒帶回家. (42) [Subtitle]: 你那個那麼燙. (43) [Subtitle]: 你會縮水. (44) [Subtitle]: 這縮水了 那麼短. (45) [Variety]: 短版. (46) [Subtitle]: 這短版哦. (47) [Slogan]: 快速冷卻技術. (48) [Subtitle]: 可以保護衣服. (49) [Variety]: 不縮水. (50) [Variety]: 不變色. (51) [Subtitle]: 永遠跟新的一樣. (52) [Subtitle]: 請問一下. (53) [Subtitle]: 你吸那個灰塵還有棉絮那些. (54) [Subtitle]: 又從這邊跑出來. (55) [Subtitle]: 從這個洞跑出來. (56) [Subtitle]: 沒有你看 這邊有集塵盒. (57) [Subtitle]: 你就打開了 刷子刷一刷. (58) [Subtitle]: 不要再刷到我. (59) [Subtitle]: 好知道. (60) [Subtitle]: 不要刷到我身上. (61) [Subtitle]: 再幫你吸一吸.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 male creator complaining about laundry, 1 female creator demonstrating the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A man in a white and red/blue striped polo shirt and jeans; a woman in a light pink boiler suit/overalls.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A studio set up to look like an indoor home area with a clothing rack, a grey sofa, and white/beige walls with modern light fixtures.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A male voice speaks rapidly in a high-pitched, comical complaining tone. An upbeat, bouncy electronic BGM starts immediately with a strong, synthesized 4/4 beat. (2) A female voice enters with high vocal arousal and a friendly, melodic tone. A digital 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the introduction of the product. The BGM maintains a steady, energetic pace. (3) The female voice delivers technical information with fast speech density. Sharp 'whoosh' sound effects punctuate the transitions between different product benefits. (4) The voices engage in an exaggerated banter session. The female voice remains confident while the male voice acts out skepticism. Minimal incidental rustling of fabric is audible. (5) The track ends with a final comedic punchline from both speakers. A playful cartoon-style pop SFX triggers at the end of the phrase, and the BGM cuts out abruptly.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Problem Presentation -> Product Introduction -> Feature Demonstration -> Objection Handling -> Final Comedic Hook
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To market the Morus V6 handheld garment steamer by using a humorous, high-energy skit that highlights its key selling points: speed, multi-functionality (ironing, sanitizing, suction), and ease of use compared to traditional steamers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, mention of brand name 'Morus V6', and detailed list of features with on-screen slogans.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a very common social media format in Taiwan where creators use comedic skits to integrate advertisements seamlessly into their content feed.
